db_routes.query_preview:
SELECT purchase_id, 
       ROUND(AVG(rating), 2) as avg_rating, 
       COUNT(*) as review_count 
FROM review 
GROUP BY purchase_id 
HAVING AVG(rating) = 5.0 AND COUNT(*) > 0;
